nodes.replace_content: const blueprint = {"template_id":"MAF_Executive_Briefing_Master","mappings":{"PROJECT_NAME":"Heinlein Foods - 90-Day Survival & Capitalization Strategy","OBJECTIVE":"Achieve cash-flow positivity and secure next-round funding within 90 days by executing a targeted operational cost reduction and aggressive market penetration strategy.","STRATEGY_SUMMARY":{"financial_tactics":["Implement immediate 15% reduction in non-essential operational expenditures.","Renegotiate terms with top 5 suppliers to extend payment cycles by 30 days.","Secure a short-term credit facility of $2.5M as an operational buffer.","Aggressively pursue collection of outstanding accounts receivable over 45 days."],"marketing_tactics":["Launch a high-impact, low-cost digital marketing campaign targeting competitor weaknesses in the premium organic segment.","Introduce a bundled product offering to increase average order value by 20%.","Establish strategic partnerships with two major online grocery delivery platforms.","Execute a PR campaign focused on brand resilience and commitment to quality to reinforce investor confidence."]}}};
